creator: upiter77@lycos.com
text:
I try to install 8.0-CURRENT from:

ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/200902/

on my notebbok Asus EEE PC 1000h with USB CD/DVD ROM drive, but I'm getting this message:

No CD/DVD devices found 


btw. freeBSD 7.1 installation on the same hardware works without problems.

greetings
Piotr

Fix: 

there is a problem with the new USB2

/usr/src/UPDATING
20090215:
The GENERIC kernels for all architectures now default to the new USB2
stack. . . .
How-To-Repeat: install 8.0-CURRENT from:

ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/200902/

on the notebbok Asus EEE PC 1000h
